leadership.name: Colonel Sarah Mitchell
leadership.summary: Colonel Mitchell brings years of leadership experience and is committed to helping students grow into responsible and confident leaders.

leadership.name: Major Robert Martinez
leadership.summary: Major Martinez works closely with cadets to develop leadership skills, teamwork, and professional responsibility.

leadership.name: First Sergeant Jim Johnson
leadership.summary: First Sergeant Jim Johnson brings over fifteen years of army service to cadets to build their character into responsible young adults.

leadership.name: Jane Perez
leadership.summary: Leads the cadet corps and oversees major program activities.

leadership.name: John Smith
leadership.summary: Assists the Brigade Commander and manages program operations.

leadership.name: Adam Watts
leadership.summary: Responsible for all battalion activities, setting goals, managing promotions, and conducting inspections.
